question: What can we infer about productivity trends over the broader period implied by the title, beyond the years shown?

options.A: Output increased steadily across the entire broader period, indicating sustained productivity gains.
options.B: Productivity declined sharply both before and after the years shown.
options.C: This limited 8-year sample does not provide enough information to judge productivity over the broader period.
options.D: Productivity remained completely flat outside of the years shown.

explanation: Only selected years are shown; productivity in other subperiods may differ.
